info.english_meaning: to be ill to be sad to suffer
info.hindI_arTa: rogI honA duKI honA duHKa sahana karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: vyaktoktO kleSate kleSeH kliSnAti tu vibADane  divAderupatAperTe taNi syAt kliSyate padam ' (Slo. 163- 164) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yatkiYcid dozamutkleSya BaktaM kAyAnna nirharet' (suSruta0 sUtra0 2020) utkleSya prakupitaM kftvA
